title: Top Tech Reviewers to Watch
subtitle: Trending
editorial: Stay ahead of the curve with the most trusted voices in tech. From deep-dive teardowns to first-look exclusives, these reviewers set the standard.

creators.name: Marques Brownlee
creators.title: Tech Reviewer & YouTuber
creators.bio: Known as MKBHD, Marques Brownlee produces high-quality tech reviews and has interviewed top industry leaders.

creators.name: Linus Sebastian
creators.title: Founder of Linus Tech Tips
creators.bio: Linus Sebastian is the founder of Linus Media Group and host of Linus Tech Tips, one of the most popular tech channels on YouTube.
